name: atomic-design-toolkit
description: Atomic Design toolkit for Flutter and Vite — decompose features into atoms, molecules, organisms, templates, and pages. Audit mode scans components, Vite bundle health (10 signals: duplicates, hashless assets, mixed majors, dual lockfiles, and more), and atomic-design enforcement hooks (V7: 7 cure-presence checks for future-drift exposure) across 18+ design system lenses. Migrate mode consumes audit reports to drive phased remediation.
